title: chrysothamnus nauseosus var. junceus
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus var. junceus, also known as Wyoming sagebrush, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its shrub-like growth habit and gray-green foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent compounds. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus nauseosus var. junceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
